1 - Guitar Digital Product - Low Ticket Offer.mp4

There's a terrible curse that plagues guitar players once they reach the intermediate stage. I call it guitar playing limbo. It's like a frustrating rut where you get stuck somewhere between playing the same old bits and pieces of songs and trying to navigate your way across the desert of guitar theory so you can freely explore the net with confidence. There's that missing link, that one missing puzzle piece that hasn't quite bridged the gap and connected all the dots for you yet. Yet it's that missing piece that reveals the why behind what you're doing so you can freely move up and down the neck. and it's the very same missing link which explains how the pros make it look so easy. Would you like to know what it is?

Well, first, let me tell you what is not. You won't find it by studying pentatonic scales, the cage system, or any other confusing guitar theories. It doesn't require you to practice 15 hours a day before you can ever become a guitar player. It has almost nothing to do with whether or not you have natural talent, your age, or even the size and shape of your fingers. That's because the key that unlocks the door to freedom on guitar is already inside you. And once you have this aha for yourself, you'll instantly become more confident in your ability and more excited about how far your guitar playing can go. You'll be able to hear a song jam with other musicians or just sit around a campfire and instantly start playing along and sounding good without ever having to think about it— even if that sounds hard to believe that you could do that right now.

My name is Jonathan Boyd, and after 23 years of playing and teaching guitar professionally, nothing makes me happier than to see the look on a guitar player's face when they finally connect these dots when they realize they're no longer limited to just a few frets— they're no longer stuck in patterns and boxes— and they're playing no longer has to sound mechanical, dull, or lifeless. You see, instead of feeling lost when it comes to making progress, they can finally explore the fretboard with confidence and get lost instead in that ultimate happy place where nothing exists but you and the guitar. That's why I created the Ultimate Lead Guitar Lightbulb Moment, a free course that has already helped open up a whole new world for over 215,000 guitar players just like you.

Like Joe Griffin, who said, 'This is the magic key I've been looking for.' I knew it was out there. Or Jason Anderson, who said, 'Out of all the books I've bought and information I've found over the years, no one has made it this easy for me.' Or Jeremiah Bishop, who said, 'It's like the guitar version of the Rosetta Stone.' I can now read the language of the fretboard. And right now, I want to help you have the same revelation so you can finally play guitar the way you always wanted. The link on this video will take you to a page where you can get my brand new course, The Ultimate Lead Guitar Light Bulb Moment, absolutely free. Just click that link and claim your free course on the next page.

In the course, you and I will walk through a series of easy and fun exercises that will open up your eyes to a whole new world on guitar, without complicated theory, and without having to practice for 15 hours a day. In fact, you can do it all in about one hour. Like I said, I'm offering you the ultimate lead guitar light bulb moment, completely free, right now in this video. The Guitar Grid is the invisible roadmap pros use to hit all the right notes and make it look easy.
